description: Rename app to 'Luu Tru Thong Minh', fix Dashboard to fetch and display real data, fix invitations schema mismatch, fix storage upload error handling, and fix PDF export error handling.
steps: 1. Rename app in frontend/public/manifest.json: change name to 'Luu Tru Thong Minh' and short_name to 'LTTM'
2. Rename app in frontend/index.html: change <title> to 'Luu Tru Thong Minh'
3. Rename app in frontend/public/offline.html: change <title> to 'Ngoai tuyen - Luu Tru Thong Minh'

4. Fix frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: add useQuery hooks to fetch properties (via getProperties from ../api/properties), contracts (via getContracts from ../api/contracts), and tasks. Display actual counts instead of dashes. Follow the useQuery pattern used in frontend/src/pages/properties/PropertyListPage.tsx.

5. Fix backend/app/services/auth_service.py invite_user function: remove 'invited_by' from the invitation_data dict since the invitations table (migration 003) does not have this column. Keep other fields that exist in the schema (id, email, role, token, organization_id, property_id, expires_at).

6. Fix backend/app/routers/staff.py invite_staff function: remove 'invited_by' and 'status' from invitation_data since neither column exists in the invitations table schema. Add the required fields that the table expects: 'token' (UUID), 'expires_at' (timestamp 48h from now). Also remove the 'invitation_properties' table insert (this table doesn't exist in any migration) - instead use the 'property_id' column directly on the invitations table.

7. Fix backend/app/services/renter_service.py upload_id_photo function: wrap the bucket.upload() call in try/except to gracefully handle storage errors (bucket not existing, permissions, etc). Return a user-friendly error via HTTPException with status 502 if storage fails.

8. Fix backend/app/services/contract_service.py export_pdf function: (a) wrap the WeasyPrint import and PDF generation in try/except, raising HTTPException 422 with message about missing system dependencies if WeasyPrint fails. (b) wrap the bucket.upload() call in try/except, raising HTTPException 502 with informative message about storage failure if upload fails.
acceptance_criteria: manifest.json has name 'Luu Tru Thong Minh' and short_name 'LTTM'
index.html title is 'Luu Tru Thong Minh'
offline.html title references 'Luu Tru Thong Minh'
DashboardPage.tsx uses useQuery to fetch properties and contracts, displaying real counts
auth_service.py invite_user does not insert 'invited_by' column
staff.py invite_staff does not insert 'invited_by' or 'status' columns, includes 'token' and 'expires_at'
renter_service.py upload_id_photo has try/except around storage upload with HTTPException on failure
contract_service.py export_pdf has try/except around WeasyPrint and storage upload with proper HTTPExceptions
Backend Python files have no syntax errors
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('app/services/auth_service.py').read()); ast.parse(open('app/routers/staff.py').read()); ast.parse(open('app/services/renter_service.py').read()); ast.parse(open('app/services/contract_service.py').read()); print('All Python files parse OK')"
